prompt: Create a highly realistic documentary-style photograph of a clear plastic water bottle lying horizontally on its side in a dry desert, pouring water from its open mouth onto cracked sandy ground. The bottle should be on the right side of the frame, transparent with blue-tinted threads at the neck, ridged sides, visible highlights and refractions, and partially filled with water. A continuous stream of water spills onto the foreground, forming a shallow muddy puddle with ripples, wet sand, small stones, and bright sparkling sunlight reflections. The camera is very low to the ground with a wide-angle close-up perspective and shallow depth of field: sharp focus on the bottle opening, water stream, puddle ripples, pebbles, and gritty desert texture, while the distant background is softly blurred. The environment is an arid desert plain under intense midday sun, with sparse dry shrubs, distant reddish-brown mountains along the horizon, and a clear saturated blue sky. Place the bright sun high in the upper left corner with starburst lens flare and harsh natural shadows. Use photorealistic lighting, crisp detail, realistic water physics, heat-dry atmosphere, no people, no labels or text on the bottle, no watermark.
